permissions.purpose: Detects failed invoice payments so ChurnGuard can start smart dunning recovery campaigns.
Reads invoice details to determine payment amount, customer, and decline reason.
Retrieves customer name and email to send personalized dunning emails.
Gets decline codes to tailor the recovery strategy for each failed payment.
Reads subscription status to determine if a failed payment is for an active subscriber.
Registers a webhook endpoint so ChurnGuard receives real-time payment failure events.
